item.title: What a weekend! 🚀 I set up a Gemini caps...
item.description: What a weekend! 🚀 I set up a Gemini capsule site 🪐, got my own PeerTube instance running, and added https://michaelreflects.com to my Zola site 🌐. Everything’s now https://standard.site ready with Bridgy Fed, Bluesky, and the AT protocol. #SelfHosting #PeerTube #GeminiProtocol

item.title: Who's the Real Loser? I am a Gen Xer, an...
item.description: Who's the Real Loser? I am a Gen Xer, and I do not consider myself part of a loser generation. I do think my... https://flipboard.com/@theeconomist/daily-reads-7c67adfnz/-/a-Lzin3-hWSTeYCwYYoTZGSQ%3Aa%3A3199507-%2F0 https://mitchelltribe.com/2026/05/23/whos-the-real-loser/

item.title: 🍿 Watched Tom Clancy's Jack Ryan: Ghost ...
item.description: 🍿 Watched Tom Clancy's Jack Ryan: Ghost War (2026) on Prime Video ⚠️ SPOILER WARNING: MILD SPOILERS My Rating: ⭐⭐⭐½ (3.5/5 stars) I agree with the other reviews. I loved the whole cast. John Krasinski does a... https://mitchelltribe.com/2026/05/25/watched-tom-clancys-jack-ryan/

item.title: A lesser-known fact: Memorial Day 🇺🇸 was...
item.description: A lesser-known fact: Memorial Day 🇺🇸 was originally called Decoration Day because of the 🕯️ floral tributes left on 🎖️ graves. #MemorialDay #RememberAndHonor #Holiday

item.title: AI Isn't Black and White Okay, this will...
item.description: AI Isn't Black and White Okay, this will probably sound controversial, but that's not my intent. I'm just sharing my thoughts because AI is everywhere right now, especially on social media and in blog posts. These... https://mitchelltribe.com/2026/05/17/ai-isnt-black-and-white/

item.title: What a morning 😓. My Hetzner server cras...
item.description: What a morning 😓. My Hetzner server crashed due to full storage 💾. I tracked down the issue and fixed a bunch of things before work, and I’m already wiped out 😩. The biggest downside to running your own stuff is definitely all the maintenance and repairs. #TechLife #SelfHosting #Homelab

item.title: Parsley, Pot Roast, and Changing Tastes ...
item.description: Parsley, Pot Roast, and Changing Tastes I saw this Bluesky post come across my timeline because I follow Food Republic, and it got my... https://www.foodrepublic.com/2130936/1980s-meals-garnished-parsley/ https://mitchelltribe.com/2026/05/09/parsley-pot-roast-and-changing/

item.title: I am at the eye doctors for my pre catar...
item.description: I am at the eye doctors for my pre cataract removal appointment the only thing for sure i am getting a toric lens. Can't wait to see clearly again.

item.title: On Star Wars Day, we remember that somet...
item.description: On Star Wars Day, we remember that sometimes the biggest ⚔️ journeys start with the smallest steps—and a little faith. 🚀 #Maythe4th #StarWars

item.title: I came across this hilarious YouTube sho...
item.description: I came across this hilarious YouTube short from a British TV show. I think the British have some great TV, and this one had me rolling on the floor laughing. Enjoy! https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=x87TJoxvHso https://michaelreflects.com/notes/note-07a73c9c3/

item.title: I think someone in our neighborhood lost...
item.description: I think someone in our neighborhood lost a rabbit 🐇, and it somehow ended up in our backyard. He won’t let us get too close, but he’s adorable! #LostRabbit

item.title: We’re under a Tornado Watch 🌪️, and the ...
item.description: We’re under a Tornado Watch 🌪️, and the weather is showing it. It’s been really windy all day 🌬️, and the rain is just starting 🌧️. We need the rain, but definitely not any tornadoes . #TornadoWatch #WeatherUpdate #Florida

item.title: Not sure I'll renew my Claude sub next y...
item.description: Not sure I'll renew my Claude sub next year 🤔. Limits are frustrating, used to reset every 4 hrs, now 5, but I hit cap in 15-20 mins ⛔. Weekly limits worse. ChatGPT feels lighter. Windsurf AI even more disappointing 😞. Thinking hard, prepping my own local LLM 💡🤖.

item.title: 🍿 Watched Nobody (2021) ⚠️ SPOILER WARNI...
item.description: 🍿 Watched Nobody (2021) ⚠️ SPOILER WARNING: MILD SPOILERS My Rating: ⭐⭐⭐⭐ (4/5 stars) Highly, highly unbelievable yet very entertaining. Great cast. If you want to kill about two hours and are after a fun, fast-paced movie, https://mitchelltribe.com/2026/04/26/watched-nobody/

item.title: Windows passwordless sign-in is a strong...
item.description: Windows passwordless sign-in is a strong security goal, but Microsoft isn't done yet. Hello, PIN, and passkeys work for login, but Task Schd, RDP, services, & network creds still need passwords. Passwordless shouldn't cause legacy Windows features to break unexpectedly ⚠️. #SelfHosting #Microsoft
